analysis_basis: manual visual analysis of project reference still

visible_text.role_description: バクラク事業部 HCM本部 本部長
visible_text.name: 吉田 達輝(takkyy)

framing.composition: one full-screen medium close-up over office background with logo top-left and white lower-left identification text
framing.subject_crop: person shown from head through seated torso; shoulders and microphone visible; table foreground may remain visible
framing.background: bright office environment kept visible; subject is not isolated on a plain card

nameplate.role_line: white bold smaller text with soft shadow only
nameplate.name_line: very large white bold text with soft shadow only

comparison_to_two_person.single_person_reference: one full-screen person, no divider, one lower-left text block for that person
comparison_to_two_person.two_person_reference: two equal vertical panels, each person has a lower text block under their own panel, and a center divider separates the views
comparison_to_two_person.framing_difference: single-person face/body can be larger and slightly right of center; two-person faces are smaller and matched across panels
comparison_to_two_person.text_difference: single-person name can be largest; two-person names remain large but slightly smaller to fit per-panel width

render_directives: Use for the first self-introduction when the left participant introduces himself.
Show the left participant close-up full-screen; do not use split layout for this first self-introduction.
Match the reference's lower-left white role/name text sizes, position, and margins.
Do not add a purple name box or black text stroke.
